meta.title: Common Room Language Studio | 可梦路语言工作室
meta.description: A multilingual learning and cultural exchange space in Tokyo. English, Chinese, and Japanese — learn, share, and connect.

hero.title: Common Room Language Studio
hero.intro: Common Room Language Studio is a multilingual learning and cultural exchange space in Tokyo — where English is our heart, and Chinese and Japanese find a welcoming home.

philosophy.title: A Space for Every Voice
philosophy.description: Inspired by the Polyglot spirit, we invite people from all backgrounds to learn, exchange, and express themselves — building a friendly, open community together.

items.title: Polyglot Spirit
items.description: English at the core, with Chinese and Japanese woven in — because languages belong together.

items.title: Cultural Exchange
items.description: Beyond grammar: stories, perspectives, and connections across cultures.

items.title: Open Community
items.description: A common room where strangers become friends over tea and conversation.

cta.title: Step into the Common Room
cta.description: Whether it's your first word or your hundredth conversation — there's a seat waiting for you.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Where languages meet, and community grows.

polyglot.title: The Polyglot Philosophy
paragraphs: Common Room Language Studio — 可梦路语言工作室 — was born from a belief that language learning is never solitary. It happens in conversation, over shared meals, through laughter and patience.

Our classroom centers on English, while embracing Chinese and Japanese for learners who seek a truly multilingual Tokyo experience. We are not a corporate training center — we are a cultural space, closer to a neighborhood bookshop than a tech company.
We invite people from every corner of the world to study, share, and express themselves freely — and to leave a little more connected than when they arrived.

items.title: Multilingual Mindset
items.description: Languages are bridges. We celebrate switching between them, mixing them, and learning through comparison.

items.title: Community First
items.description: Regular events, reading clubs, and tea talks keep learning alive outside the classroom.

items.title: Warm & Patient
items.description: Small groups, attentive teachers, and a space designed to put you at ease.

courses.title: Courses & Pricing
courses.subtitle: Practical programs for real-life communication — from everyday chat to professional settings.

cta.title: Ready to Start Learning?

items.title: English Lessons
items.description: General English for daily life, study, and social confidence. Small groups, plenty of speaking time.

items.title: Exam Preparation
items.description: Targeted coaching for TOEIC, IELTS, and other exams — strategy, practice, and calm preparation.

items.title: Interview Training
items.description: Mock interviews, self-introduction polish, and the confidence to present your best self.

items.title: Business English
items.description: Meetings, emails, presentations, and workplace communication for professionals in Tokyo.

items.title: Travel English
items.description: Essential phrases and real scenarios for confident travel — airports, hotels, and beyond.

items.title: Private Lessons
items.description: One-on-one sessions tailored to your goals, schedule, and learning style.

courses.note: Chinese and Japanese courses are also available. Contact us for details.

cta.title: Not sure where to start?
